title: Harden TTT doc splitting for missing/trailing BOS edge cases
author: shuofengzhang

data.description: Robust document splitting in _find_docs for tokenizer/export edge cases, including fallback to a single full-stream document when no BOS tokens are present, skipping BOS-only fragments, and raising clearer errors for invalid validation inputs.

novel_contributions: Hardened _find_docs in train_gpt.py to handle missing BOS tokens by falling back to a single validation document when the token stream is long enough.
Skipped degenerate BOS-only fragments instead of asserting.
Added explicit ValueErrors for cases with no valid validation documents.
Added regression tests covering no-BOS fallback, trailing BOS-only fragments, and too-short invalid sequences.
